sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Interesting! The DOWN action moved the whole "white frame with blue center" structure down. It was at rows 36-40, now it's at rows 40-44. The blue square inside moved from rows 37-38 to rows 41-42. The player (green) moved from rows 41-43 to rows 45-47.
So the white frame with blue center is attached to the player! When I press SPACE, the dark frame turns white and becomes part of the player's "inventory" or "collection". The player then carries it.
So the mechanic is:
1. Move to a dark frame with blue center
2. Press SPACE to "collect" it (turns it white and attaches to player)
3. The collected item moves with the player
Now I need to collect all 3 blue targets. I already collected one (the bottom one). I need to collect the top-right one and the left one.
But wait - the player now has a white frame with blue center attached. Let me think about how to navigate. The player (green) is at rows 45-47, cols 32-35. The white frame with blue is at rows 40-44, cols 32-35.
I need to go to:
- Top-right frame: rows 24-27, cols 44-47
- Left frame: rows 28-31, cols 16-19
Let me try moving UP to go toward the targets. But I need to be careful about the HUD bar at the bottom.
Actually, let me think about this differently. The player seems to move as a single unit now (green + white frame with blue). Let me try navigating to the left target first since it's closer horizontally.
